features: FLEXIBLE FABRIC: Masterplast Assorted Sized fabric plasters are flexible and comfortable, the combination of a durable soft touch top layer with an absorbent wound pad to protect from infection whilst the wound heals, protects a variety of cuts and grazes
PROTECT: Each plaster is air permeable allowing the wound to breathe, aiding the healing process, whilst being protected.
ABSORB & HEAL: Durable top layer with an absorbent wound pad to protect from infection whilst the wound heals
STERILE: Individually wrapped for safety, four sizes to suit a variety of cuts and grazes. Plasters sizes , box contains 100 plasters
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Box of 100 Plasters
description: Product Description Masterplast Assorted Sized Fabric Plasters are ideal dressings to protect wounds. Inlcudes a variety of sizes for the most common cuts and grazes. Each plaster is air permeable allowing the wound to breathe, aiding the healing process, whilst being protected. Durable top layer with an absorbent wound pad to protect from infection whilst the wound heals. Pack 100 Directions Clean the wound, apply the plaster, and secure it in place.
